import React from 'react'
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'
import { BrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom'
import App from './App'
import { MoviesProvider } from './context/MoviesContext'

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root') as HTMLElement).render(
  <React.StrictMode>
    <BrowserRouter>
      <MoviesProvider>
        <App />
      </MoviesProvider>
    </BrowserRouter>
  </React.StrictMode>
)

import React, { useMemo, useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useMoviesContext } from '../context/MoviesContext' const Header: React.FC = () => { const location = useLocation() const navigate = useNavigate() const { searchQuery, setSearchQuery, genres, selectedGenre, setSelectedGenre, sortOrder, setSortOrder } = useMoviesContext() const [localSearch, setLocalSearch] = useState(searchQuery) useEffect(() => { setLocalSearch(searchQuery) }, [searchQuery]) const isActive = (path: string) => { return location.pathname === path } const debouncedUpdate = useMemo(() => { let timer: number | undefined return (value: string) => { window.clearTimeout(timer) timer = window.setTimeout(() => { setSearchQuery(value) }, 300) } }, [setSearchQuery]) const handleSearchChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { const v = e.target.value setLocalSearch(v) debouncedUpdate(v) } const handleLogoClick = () => { navigate('/') } return (
Home My List
handleSearchChange(e)} placeholder="Search movies, genres, or keywords..." className="w-full bg-gray-800 text-gray-100 placeholder-gray-400 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 border border-gray-700" />
handleSearchChange(e)} placeholder="Search movies..." className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 text-gray-100 placeholder-gray-400 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 border border-gray-700" />
) } export default Header

import React from 'react' import { Movie } from '../types/Movie' import { useMoviesContext } from '../context/MoviesContext' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' interface Props { movie: Movie } const MovieCard: React.FC = ({ movie }) => { const { isFavorite, toggleFavorite } = useMoviesContext() const navigate = useNavigate() const fav = isFavorite(movie.id) return (

{movie.title}

{movie.year}
{movie.duration} ★ {movie.rating.toFixed(1)}
) } export default MovieCard

import React, { useMemo } from 'react' import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useMoviesContext } from '../context/MoviesContext' import MovieList from '../components/MovieList' const Home: React.FC = () => { const { movies, loading, trending, topRated, newReleases, byGenre, favoritesList } = useMoviesContext() const location = useLocation() const navigate = useNavigate() const featured = useMemo(() => { if (trending.length > 0) return trending[0] if (topRated.length > 0) return topRated[0] return movies[0] }, [trending, topRated, movies]) const isMyListView = location.pathname === '/my-list' if (loading) { return (
{Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
) } return (
{!isMyListView && featured && (

{featured.year} {featured.duration} ★ {featured.rating.toFixed(1)}

Browse
)}
{isMyListView ? ( ) : ( <> )}
) } export default Home
files.src/types/Movie.ts:
export interface Movie {
  id: string
  title: string
  year: number
  duration: string
  rating: number
  genres: string[]
  description: string
  poster: string
  backdrop: string
  trending?: boolean
  topRated?: boolean
  tags?: string[]
}

export const getMovies = async (): Promise<Movie[]> => {
  await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 400))
  return dataset
}
files.src/routes/AppRoutes.tsx:
import React from 'react'
import { Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom'
import Home from '../pages/Home'
import Watch from '../pages/Watch'

const AppRoutes: React.FC = () => {
  return (
    <Routes>
      <Route path="/" element={<Home />} />
      <Route path="/my-list" element={<Home />} />
      <Route path="/watch/:id" element={<Watch />} />
      <Route path="*" element={<Home />} />
    </Routes>
  )
}

export default AppRoutes
